header.description: Send custom email notifications when form events occur. Use @ mentions to include form data.

name.label: Plugin Name
name.hint: A descriptive name to identify this plugin

recipientEmail.label: Recipient Email (fixed address)
recipientEmail.hint: Optional if you select a form email field below. You can use both at once.

recipientField.label: Or send to a form's email field
recipientField.hint: Sends to whatever address the respondent enters in this field, in addition to the fixed address above.
recipientField.noFieldsHint: This form has no email fields yet. Add one to send notifications to a respondent's own address.
recipientField.notRequiredWarning: This field isn't marked as required, so respondents may leave it blank. If they do, this notification won't be sent for that submission.

emailMessage.title: Email Message
emailMessage.description: Compose your email message with rich formatting and @ mentions
emailMessage.label: Message Content
emailMessage.hintWithFields: Use rich formatting including bold, italic, headings, lists, quotes, and links. Type @ to mention form fields ({{count}} available) and reference user responses.
emailMessage.hintWithoutFields: Use rich formatting including bold, italic, headings, lists, quotes, and links. Add some fields to your form to enable @ mentions for personalizing messages.
emailMessage.hintWithFields_suffix: headings, lists, quotes, and links. Type @ to mention form fields ({{count}} available) and reference user responses.
emailMessage.hintWithoutFields_suffix: headings, lists, quotes, and links. Add some fields to your form to enable @ mentions for personalizing messages.

pdfAttachment.title: PDF Attachment
pdfAttachment.description: Optionally attach a generated PDF to this email, filled in with the response's data
pdfAttachment.hint: Generated fresh at send time from this form's response data. If the template is later deleted, the email still sends without the attachment.
pdfAttachment.noTemplatesHint: This form has no PDF templates yet. Create one in PDF Templates to attach it to this notification.

triggerEvents.title: Trigger Events
triggerEvents.description: Select when this plugin should be triggered

formSubmitted.label: Form Submitted
formSubmitted.description: Triggered when a user submits a response

triggerEvents.validation: Please select at least one event

validation.noEvents: Please select at least one event
validation.noRecipient: Enter a recipient email or choose a form email field
